summary: Combat hit detection and damage resolution system. Links collision spheres to character bones, runs hit detection across volume sets, calculates damage outcomes, and spawns visual hit effects.
subsystems: Collision volume setup: links spheres to bone transforms via x_998ccc48 and x_87049dce config
Hit detection: 4 collision sets (upper body, lower body, grounded, alternate ground) using Manhattan radius and midpoint search
Damage resolution: HP deduction, ring-out (y=0), grab/slam states, death, hitstun animation selection
Hit effects: spawns red (attacker) and blue (defender) flash objects
open_questions: x_cc2e74aa is NON_MATCHING (compiled from ASM) — the hit outcome logic needs decompilation
x_87049dce collision config — exact meaning of each field (bone indices, offset vectors)
